mapper.insert: INSERT INTO watchlist (user_no, movie_no, status) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{movieNo}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT watch_no AS watchNo, user_no AS userNo, movie_no AS movieNo, status AS status, reg_date AS regDate FROM watchlist WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND movie_no = #{movieNo}

SELECT w.watch_no AS watchNo, w.user_no AS userNo, w.movie_no AS movieNo, w.status AS status, w.reg_date AS regDate, m.title AS title, m.poster_path AS posterPath, m.tmdb_id AS tmdbId FROM watchlist w JOIN movie m ON w.movie_no = m.movie_no WHERE w.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY w.reg_date DESC
